# PRUVIQ - Free Crypto Strategy Backtesting Platform

> Don't Believe. Verify.

## What is PRUVIQ?
PRUVIQ (pruviq.com) is a free, no-code crypto strategy backtesting platform. Users build custom trading strategies by combining 11+ technical indicators, then backtest on 535+ coins with 2+ years of real market data. Results include realistic fees (0.04%) and slippage (0.02%).

## Key Features
- **No-Code Strategy Builder**: Combine Bollinger Bands, RSI, MACD, EMA, Stochastic, ADX, ATR, Historical Volatility, Volume, Candle Patterns, and Price Action with AND/OR logic
- **535+ Coin Backtesting**: All Binance USDT perpetual futures, 1-hour OHLCV candles
- **Full Backtest in <3 Seconds**: Vectorized execution across all coins
- **Live Trading Verification**: One strategy (BB Squeeze SHORT) runs on a real Binance Futures account. Every trade published, including losses
- **Yearly Breakdown**: Performance split by year to detect overfitting
- **Interactive SL/TP Simulation**: 5x5 grid with equity curves for any strategy
- **Bilingual**: Full English + Korean support

## Strategy Library (with transparency)
| Strategy | Direction | Status | Win Rate | Profit Factor |
|----------|-----------|--------|----------|---------------|
| BB Squeeze SHORT | Short | Verified (live) | 70.4% | 2.55 |
| BB Squeeze LONG | Long | Killed | 51.0% | 0.98 |
| Momentum LONG | Long | Killed (-$14,115) | 37.5% | 0.71 |
| ATR Breakout | Long | Shelved | - | - |
| HV Squeeze | Short | Shelved | - | - |

## Important URLs
- Homepage: https://pruviq.com
- Strategy Builder: https://pruviq.com/builder
- Strategy Library: https://pruviq.com/strategies
- Live Performance: https://pruviq.com/performance
- Fee Calculator: https://pruviq.com/fees
- Blog / Education: https://pruviq.com/blog
- Telegram: https://t.me/PRUVIQ

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: Astro 5.x + Preact + Tailwind 4.x on Cloudflare Pages
- Backend: Python 3.12 + FastAPI on Mac Mini M4 Pro
- Data: 613 CSV files (1H OHLCV), 2+ years
- Charts: lightweight-charts (TradingView)

## Contact
- Email: contact@pruviq.com
- Telegram: https://t.me/PRUVIQ
